title: Fermented Croatian Cabbage Bake
description: A tangy and flavorful side dish that combines the best of fermented and Croatian cuisines. Simply layer cabbage, fermented ingredients, and bake to perfection.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together shredded cabbage, minced garlic, and Croatian paprika.
Drizzle with olive oil and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and cover with foil.
Bake for 30 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15-20 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
